questions.question: In which city, India’s Central Vista project, that was recently in news, is coming up?
questions.explanation: Central Vista is an ambitious plan that includes setting up of a new Parliament building, bringing all central ministries closer, and redeveloping the existing heritage structures in and around the central vista. Under the project, eight new government office buildings, a new Parliament House and a residential complex near the South Block that could house the homes of the Prime Minister and the Vice-President are among the projects that may come.

questions.question: In which year, the MoU to establish the ‘BIMSTEC grid interconnection’ was signed between the members of BIMSTEC countries?
questions.explanation: Recently, BIMSTEC and South Asia Regional Initiative for Energy Integration jointly organized the conference titled ‘Increase Cooperation in the Energy Sector in BIMSTEC Region.’ The BIMSTEC members are planning for a 3000 km BIMSTEC power grid called BIMSTEC grid interconnection. The MoU was signed in 2018.

questions.question: Which city is the venue of first ‘National Conference on Coastal Disaster Risk Reduction and Resilience (CDRR&R) – 2020’ ?
questions.explanation: The first ‘National Conference on Coastal Disaster Risk Reduction and Resilience (CDRR&R) – 2020’ was organized by the National Institute of Disaster Management (NIDM), in New Delhi on February 25, 2020.

questions.question: The Jagananna Vasathi Deevena scheme, that was recently in news, is a scheme of which state government?
questions.explanation: Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister YS Jaganmohan Reddy on February 24, 2020 launched ‘Jagananna Vasathi Deevena’ scheme of providing financial assistance for hostel and mess charges of students studying in it is, polytechnic, and degree colleges.

questions.question: Which country organised a training course on ‘Vessel Search Technique’ for Indian Coast Guard and Customs personnel at Chennai?
questions.explanation: The Mobile Training Team of the Australian Border Force conducted the training course on ‘Vessel Search Technique’ for the personnel of Indian Coast Guard, Customs and Coastal Security Group members of the Tamil Nadu Police. Indian Coast Guard organised this training course at the capital of Tamil Nadu, Chennai, along with the Border Force of Australia.

questions.question: The First anniversary of the launch of which welfare scheme was observed on February 24?

options.label: D
options.text: Pradhan Mantri Laghu Vyapari Maan-dhan Yojana

questions.explanation: The First anniversary of the launch of Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN) scheme was recently observed on February 24, 2020. PM-KISAN is a Central Sector scheme with 100% funding from Government of India. Under the Scheme an annual income support of Rs.6000 is provided to all farmer families across the country in three equal instalments of Rs.2000.

questions.question: India is set to buy the ‘Sikorsky Romeo’ helicopters from which country?
questions.explanation: During the Indian visit of the US President Donald Trump, India and the US signed a $3 billion military helicopter deal. It includes the deal for 24 MH-60 Sikorsky Romeo multi-role helicopters and 6 Apache attack choppers. The Romeo Seahawk helicopters, which are to be deployed in Indian Navy, have state-of-the-art combat systems. The Apache choppers are already used by Indian Air Force.

questions.question: Bob Iger, who recently tendered his resignation, was the Chief Executive Officer of which global firm for 15 years?
questions.explanation: The Chief Executive Officer of the Walt Disney Company commonly called as Disney, Bob Iger recently tendered his resignation. He has served as the CEO of the US-based multi-national mass-media company from 2005. Under his leadership, the company successfully purchased Star Wars, Marvel and Fox’s entertainment businesses. Bob Chapek is to replace Iger as the next CEO. Iger will be the executive chairman till 31 December 2021.

questions.question: As per the new agreement signed by the Container Corporation of India (Concor) and RZD Logistics JSC (Russian Railways), cargos are to be transported through which country?
questions.explanation: Container Corporation of India (Concor) and RZD Logistics JSC (Russian Railways) recently signed a service agreement for transporting cargo between India and Russia using a single invoice. The containers will move between the two countries by using the International North South Transport Corridor (INSTC), which passes through Iran. The corridor also passes through Azerbaijan.

questions.question: EASE 3.0, an initiative which was in news recently, is associated with which field?
questions.explanation: Union Minister for Finance & Corporate Affairs Nirmala Sitharaman recently unveiled the initiative of Public Sector Banks named ‘EASE 3.0’. The initiative aims to enhance Ease of banking in all customer experiences, using information technology. The EASE agenda was initially launched in 2018 by Public Sector Banks, for providing smart and effective banking to customers.
